text:
Much noise lately about haptic buttons being “faster.” But independent reviews like RTINGS have shown that our last gen @Razer Viper V3 Pro (which was launched in 2024) has almost the same click latency (0.1ms latency diff) as a new mouse from the competition in 2026.

author: minliangtan

text:
I'm doing a BIG refactoring in the OpenXR OSX code...
- Remove SDL3 and embrace native MacOS SDKs for the runtime
- A SwiftUI mac app for the simulator that shares the same code with the iOS and VisionPro apps, using a Swift package
- I added a VisionOS project too
